title: Didache — Teaching of the Twelve Apostles
author: Anonymous (Apostolic Fathers)
description: An early Christian treatise containing instructions for Christian communities. It is considered one of the oldest non-canonical Christian writings, providing guidance on ethics, rituals, and church organization.
